errors_and_solutions.error: GLTF type cast error con drei v10
errors_and_solutions.solution: Usar 'as unknown as GLTFResult' doble cast

errors_and_solutions.error: Página se veía con fondo blanco vs negro original
errors_and_solutions.cause: Faltaban custom colors + utility classes del Tailwind v3 config original
errors_and_solutions.solution: Crear iphone-15.css con @theme inline + @utility para portar todas las clases

errors_and_solutions.error: Chrome DevTools MCP + Docker MCP desconectados
errors_and_solutions.cause: Stale SingletonLock + 6 instancias zombie de Docker gateway
errors_and_solutions.solution: Limpiar locks y procesos. MCPs requieren reinicio de sesión de Claude Code
Usar headless:false con --use-gl=angle --use-angle=metal para GPU real

useBreakpoint hook (reactive breakpoint detection, SSR-safe)
ESLint plugin exportable: 4 rules (no-hardcoded-colors, no-inline-styles, require-aria-label, require-image-alt)
Demo page /demo-responsive verified desktop + iPhone 14 Pro

50MB assets copied (9 videos, 15 images, 5 fonts, 1 audio)
CSS specificity battle: @layer utilities loses to globals, @theme inline doesn't work in imported CSS
Safari VideoCarousel fix: IntersectionObserver fallback + removed loadedData gate
Medivista-pro Tier 1 completed in parallel (dark mode 138 fixes, 113 aria-labels, responsive mobile, alt text)
4 commits pushed, PR #1 updated
changes: 10 Zentry template components + CSS + layout + page
globals.css cleaned (removed Zentry-specific styles that leaked)

errors_and_solutions.error: R3F eventSource on root div intercepts all page clicks
@theme inline in layout-imported CSS doesn't generate Tailwind utilities
errors_and_solutions.solution: Use explicit CSS classes outside @layer, prefixed (zn-blue-50)

errors_and_solutions.error: @layer utilities loses specificity vs unscoped globals.css rules
errors_and_solutions.solution: Scope all template CSS under .zentry-template selector, no @layer

errors_and_solutions.error: Design system fonts override template fonts (Instrument Sans wins over Zentry)
errors_and_solutions.solution: Direct font-family in scoped selectors: .zentry-template .hero-heading { font-family: zentry }

errors_and_solutions.error: Video loader stuck — onLoadedData doesn't fire after SSR hydration
errors_and_solutions.solution: Fallback useEffect checking video.readyState >= 3 on mount

errors_and_solutions.error: loadedData.length > 3 gate blocks Safari (onLoadedMetadata doesn't fire for all)
errors_and_solutions.solution: Removed gate, play based on startPlay + isPlaying state only

errors_and_solutions.error: useEffect dependency array size changed between renders
errors_and_solutions.solution: Keep same 4 deps [startPlay, videoId, isPlaying, loadedData] but remove blocking condition

next_steps: Design factory process for efficient template porting
Polish Zentry template (Features grid, remaining color issues)
Integrate responsive primitives + lint plugin in medivista-pro

errors_and_solutions.cause: React.ElementType too broad for Lucide icon className prop
errors_and_solutions.solution: Import LucideIcon type explicitly from lucide-react

errors_and_solutions.error: h1/h3 headings rendering at 61px/39px despite text-xl Tailwind class
errors_and_solutions.cause: globals.css line 232-237 sets h1-h6 font-size with CSS vars that beat Tailwind utilities
errors_and_solutions.solution: Changed heading elements to p tags so Tailwind controls sizing

errors_and_solutions.cause: Page rendered in light mode by default
errors_and_solutions.solution: Added dark class to root container div

errors_and_solutions.error: Hero Saldo Neto card content overflow
errors_and_solutions.cause: flex layout with large number + right column exceeding card width
errors_and_solutions.solution: Restructured to single-column with justify-between header row
